note: tsc-launch-metadata-schema COMPLETE on staging: Apps SEO fields + Full JSON-LD (static via API, 6 CMS-template blocks pasted in Designer, site-wide Org/WebSite). Acceptance 20/20. Rich-Results validation deferred to production launch (Google robots cache blocks RRT on .webflow.io).

testPages.description: Vanilla-JS rebuild of the leadership .modal2 open/close (replaces Webflow IX2 a-146/a-147): 500ms outQuad slide + ease fade, plus role=dialog, focus trap, ESC, scroll-lock, focus-return, reduced-motion.
Validates /carsa-build Phase 6 verification scripts (contrast, touch targets, analytics soft check) and skill trigger narrowing.
Unit tests for weekly news digest CLI tool — RSS/Atom parsing, HTML scraping, Claude API scoring, markdown output, dedup state
Nav logo replay fixes (display:none bug, destroyLogoHover, ST refresh) and transition dial click-to-scroll through morph
Mobile/tablet nav logo tap triggers full page reload instead of replay on homepage post-morph
NEM Life mobile QA fixes — page titles, ervaringen heading, Christel card stacking, NEM Methode spacing, footer links
NEM Life site remediation — 5 phases: SEO metadata, JSON-LD schemas, a11y + headings, CMS + ops, growth + launch
Coconut homepage refresh — new sections (value props, persona, MTD table), rewritten hero/FAQ/CTA, deleted carousel/bank logos
NEM Life read-more expand/collapse — GSAP accordion toggle on data-button/data-block siblings with Dutch text swap
NEM Life zelftest quiz data extraction — reads CMS questions and results into window.__quizData for React component
Carsa near-page location redirect — hides zero-count facet-wrappers and redirects to /used-cars with filter preservation
NEM Life 123 cards + wat-als — mobile trigger timing fix (bottom 95%) and wat-als desktop/mobile alignment to same stagger pattern
NEM Life backend cleanup — English page titles, Dutch slugs, CMS field Title Case, help texts, orphan flagging

NEM TEST Phase B — landing page structure, 5-screen quiz flow, scoring logic, pill buttons, form validation, screen transitions, correction flow, i18n (NL+EN), e2e signup via MailerSend API + Gmail API
TSC brand colour variables — updated Base/Light, Lift values, plus 20 new brand scale variables (Cyan, Ink, Steel, Yellow) in Webflow Designer
TSC Cargo rem migration — 86 Webflow Variables migrated from px/vw to rem/em across Typography, Layout, Radius, Icon collections with fluid root CSS
Carsa VDP script externalisation — verifies 19 inline scripts work correctly when loaded as single external CDN bundle (Phase 1) and modular init.js loader (Phase 2)
Carsa service site migration — hub page, 5 location booking pages (Acuity embed), winter health check, cross-sell sections, JSON-LD schema, 301 redirects
TSC historic blog migration — 7 WordPress posts (2019-2021) migrated to Webflow CMS News collection with correct dates, AVIF images, and categories
Carsa visual regression system — Playwright toHaveScreenshot proof-of-concept: static page diffs, CMS-masked diffs, console error checks, broken link detection
Carsa code migration — page-by-page inline code externalisation to GitHub CDN, baseline and post-migration tests for all interactive features

TSC dedicated SEO fields — seo-title/seo-description added to 5 templated CMS collections (Products, Services, RailOS Devices, News, Case Studies) and bound in template-page SEO settings; verifies rendered title/meta/OG tags on item pages

TSC hero/CTA background video loading — source-stripping so off-breakpoint and below-fold variants never fetch, breakpoint-correct hydration, progressive low→high hero swap, reduced-motion/saveData guards; targets mobile Lighthouse LCP via font/render-blocking chain alongside ~14MB video bandwidth saving
TSC desktop nav mega-menu — clicking a non-link area of a .master_dropdown panel closes its parent Webflow dropdown; child links still navigate; desktop-only (scoped by .nav-menu-dektop)

TSC responsive image resizing to AVIF — measured on-site render widths @1440/@479, 2x retina targets, 100px-gap bucketing into 730/960/1180/1500/2850, magick+avifenc encode; shell Tier-1 verify (width==bucket, format, size, originals-untouched). Output to Downloads/optimised/<bucket>/, not deployed.

TSC launch metadata + schema — writes missing SEO title/meta for the 11 RailOS Apps CMS items, adds Full JSON-LD schema site-wide (Organization/WebSite/BreadcrumbList/Product/Service/FAQPage/NewsArticle/Person/SoftwareApplication/CreativeWork/VideoObject), and re-audits all existing meta for accuracy; verifies distinct app titles and parseable typed JSON-LD on sampled pages
